required_prompt_line: If a node becomes blocked or failed, record the exact blocked node id, missing evidence or stop gate, safe repair or repack action, and resume from the latest checkpoint after repair.
exact_next_action_after: Emit Foundry import for mission-recommendation-next-28 and execute exactly one active node.
summary: Node 27 makes blocked-node continuation explicit in generated Atlas prompts so final response is not used instead of a repair or resume action.
